name: arifos-mcp
description: arifOS Constitutional AI Governance MCP Server - 11 Mega-Tools (37 modes), backward-compatible legacy aliases, and VAULT999 ledger

deployment.transport_note: SSE removed: deprecated by MCP spec (2025-03) and Microsoft Copilot Studio (2025-08). Use streamable-http for all remote clients.

profiles.full: Canonical 11 mega-tools with deprecated legacy aliases for compatibility. Default for VPS/local use.
profiles.copilot: Copilot Studio-safe surface with canonical mega-tools only. Set ARIFOS_PUBLIC_TOOL_PROFILE=copilot.

tools.description: Canonical 11-tool governed surface. Full profile keeps deprecated aliases registered as compatibility shims.

authentication.note: Set COPILOT_API_KEY env var to enable. Leave empty for open access (development). In Copilot Studio wizard: Authentication -> API Key -> Header -> X-API-Key.
